stemHtml: In the legend of a navigation chart, a beacon is mentioned to be a TVOR. Which description of the TVOR is correct?

options.a: A terminal VOR beacon used especially for aircraft on the final approach heading to the runway.
options.b: A VOR station that is emitting a signal to test VOR indicators in an aircraft, and it is most commonly located at an aerodrome.
options.c: A VOR station with a shorter range, used as part of the approach and departure structure at major aerodromes.
options.d: A conventional VOR beacon with an antenna that looks like a ‘’T’’ due to the horizontal and the perpendicular vertical parts.
